subject: LIGO/Virgo/KAGRA S230808i: retraction of a GW unmodeled transient candidate
submitter: Shivaraj Kandhasamy at Inter-University Centre for Astronomy and Astrophysics (LVK collaboration) <shivaraj@iucaa.in>
body:
The LIGO Scientific Collaboration, the Virgo Collaboration, and the
KAGRA Collaboration report:

The trigger S230808i is no longer considered to be a candidate of interest: pipeline experts consider this trigger is of low significance.
